summary: Liquid AI releases 8B-A1B, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts model with 8 billion parameters and improved coding capabilities
OpenAI Codex now controls Windows PCs autonomously for testing and bug hunting
Anthropic AI vulnerability scanner in enterprise beta, IBM joins Glasswing
Robinhood launches AI agentic trading, allowing AI agents to trade stocks and make purchases
GitHub Copilot gets its own AI model, Project Polaris, a homegrown AI coding model
OpenAI opens Rosalind Biodefense to vetted US developers for biodefense applications
SoftBank invests €75 billion in AI data centers in France, expanding European AI infrastructure
Claude Opus 4.8 orchestrates hundreds of parallel subagents, achieving 84% on browser-agent benchmark
StepFun releases Step 3.7 Flash, a 198B MoE vision-language model for coding agents and search workflows
Google launched Gemini Embedding 2, a natively multimodal AI model that processes text, images, video, audio, and PDFs into a single semantic space.
Google released Gemini Spark, an agentic AI tool that can work on tasks in the background on Google Cloud.
Perplexity Commerce launches AI shopping agent that threatens Google's product search moat
Shopify rolls out AI-native storefront engine at Unite 2026
KAIKAKU.AI published Epicure, a family of three ingredient AI models trained on 4.14 million multilingual recipes.
Mudler released LocalAI v4.3.5, an open-source AI engine with bug fixes and new features.
StanfordNLP released DSPy 3.3.0b1, a framework for programming language models, with new features and improvements.
Hexo Labs released SIA, an open-source self-improving AI agent that accelerates superintelligence by 350X.
Anthropic released Opus 4.8, a new version of its most advanced publicly available model, with improved performance and features.
Sesame launches its iOS app with conversational AI startup from Oculus founders
Mistral AI releases Mistral Large 3, a 675B parameter MoE model, open source under Apache 2.0
Jasper research releases MONET, the largest open image-text dataset for world-class image generation research
Google Cloud releases Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro, AI models for image generation and editing
Biohub releases ESMFold2, a protein-folding AI model that predicts structures with state-of-the-art accuracy and speed
DeepSeek V4 launches with a 1M context window and full compatibility with Huawei Ascend and Cambricon chips
EAGLE 3.1 released, advancing speculative decoding through collaboration between EAGLE team, vLLM, and TorchSpec
Avaturn releases AVTR-1, the first open-weights AI avatar duplex model
AWS announced the Agent Toolkit for AWS, an open-source project that helps AI coding agents work with AWS more reliably.
Elastic releases Jina v5 Omni, a multimodal embedding family with drop-in compatibility and improved performance
Oracle AI Database 26ai reaches general availability, introducing native vector search and AI-driven query optimization
Cohere releases its most powerful AI model, Command A+, as open source
NVIDIA released NeMo Agent Toolkit v1.7.0, an open-source library for efficiently connecting and optimizing teams of AI agents.
Neo4j Labs released Agent Memory v0.4.0, a graph-native memory system for AI agents and context graphs.
Turbovec, a Rust vector index with Python bindings, is built on Google's TurboQuant algorithm for efficient vector search
Microsoft released Agent Governance Toolkit v3.7.0, a toolkit for policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents.
